name: markdownink-mcp
description: Render Markdown beautifully to terminal-ready ANSI — syntax highlighting, tables, lists, and footnotes — over MCP.
long_description:
MarkdownInk.Mcp exposes the MarkdownInk rendering engine (Markdig + Spectre.Console + TextMateSharp) as an MCP server, so an AI agent can turn Markdown into beautiful, terminal-ready output: headings, syntax-highlighted fenced code blocks, tables, ordered/unordered/task lists, nested block quotes, footnotes, and OSC-8 clickable links. Output is ANSI-colored by default, or plain text with `ansi: false`.

Requires the **.NET 10 SDK** on your machine: this bundle launches the server on demand with `dnx` (the SDK's NuGet tool runner). Nothing is pre-installed — `dnx` fetches and caches the `MarkdownInk.Mcp` NuGet package on first use.

tools.name: render_markdown
tools.description: Render a Markdown string to beautiful terminal-ready output (ANSI by default).

tools.name: render_markdown_file
tools.description: Read a Markdown file from disk and render it to beautiful terminal-ready output (ANSI by default).
